title: drimiopsis barteri
intro: Drimiopsis barteri, also known as the leopard lily or leopard orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in West African folk medicine, where its roots and bulbs are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Drimiopsis barteri are said to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a diuretic. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and bulbs of Drimiopsis barteri are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or ointments for topical application.
